title: Rocket Lab Announces Second Quarter 2024 Financial Results, Posts Record Revenue on 71% Year-on-Year Growth
text: Rocket Lab's second quarter was the highest revenue quarter in Company history at $106 million. This represented a 71% year-on-year revenue increase. The company achieved significant milestones with the successful completion of the first hot fire for the Archimedes engine, marking progress on its new medium-lift Neutron rocket. Revenue, gross margin and adjusted EBITDA all came in better than expected in Q2 2024. Q3 2024 guidance indicated GAAP Gross Margins between 25% and 27%, and Non-GAAP Gross Margins between 30% and 32%. The company's strong operational execution and growing backlog reflect accelerating demand across its launch and space systems segments.
